subject: Abelardo Avellaneda Delgado
summary: 68-year-old grandfather died during ICE transport. Found 'cold and stiff' by EMS. Forensic evidence contradicts official timeline by 30+ minutes. Blood pressure 226/57 (stroke-level) before transport. Congressional investigation into TransCor/CoreCivic.

victim_details.name: Abelardo Avellaneda-Delgado
victim_details.medical_condition: Hypertensive crisis (226/57 BP), deteriorated in jail
victim_details.location_of_death: TransCor transport van, Webster County, Georgia
